g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the data sources in this project')
sendPrompt('What user activity data do we generate?')
sendPrompt('What product events do we track?')
sendPrompt('What delivery events do we track?')
sendPrompt('Why do we use Apache Kafka and how does it work in this project?')
g.text: Topics: orders, activity, products, deliveries — real-time event streaming

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why do we use Apache Spark for stream processing?')
sendPrompt('Why do we use Spark batch processing and how does it differ from streaming?')
sendPrompt('How do we use PostgreSQL as a data warehouse with star schema modeling?')
g.text: Star schema: fact_orders, dim_customers, dim_products, dim_time

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why do we use Apache Airflow and what does it orchestrate in this project?')
g.text: DAGs: schedule batch jobs, trigger transforms, monitor pipeline health

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What Power BI dashboards do we build for this project?')
g.text: Sales KPIs, order trends, delivery performance, revenue analytics
